metadata.description: JEG Claude Marketplace — Community plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: cc-cnf-sync
plugins.description: Backup and restore Claude Code configuration, with per-project memory AND global user config (CLAUDE.md, commands, skills, agents, settings) kept in continuous two-way sync across machines/OS via SessionStart/SessionEnd hooks. Conflict-safe 3-way merge — editing a note never self-conflicts, and divergent edits are never lost. Authenticates entirely through the GitHub CLI (gh) — no token stored by the plugin; gh keeps the credential in your OS credential store and wires git (and the hook) to use it. Backed by a private GitHub repository, fully portable across Linux, macOS and Windows. Run /setup after installing.
